description: An employee believes their Paid Time Off (PTO) balance is incorrect.

nodes.task_description: Identify the employee and retrieve their current PTO balance and recent accrual/usage history.

expected_outcome.value: HR specialist pulls up the employee's leave history.

nodes.task_description: Review the history and identify a discrepancy (e.g., a day off was recorded as 2 days).

expected_outcome.value: Specialist finds an error in a past time-off entry.

nodes.task_description: Make a manual adjustment to the employee's PTO balance in the HRIS to correct the error.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist successfully corrects the leave balance in the system.
